subcodes.first_line: O ye chosen ones of God and His loved ones! Know with clear certitude that whatsoever may befall you of tribulation and adversity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اصفیاء الله و احبائه بیقین مبین بدانید آنچه وارد شود از ضراء و باساء و یا
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @unity; oneness of humanity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the power of words; of speech
